song_name: Billie Eilish - 8 - Harry Styles - Adore You
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
Walk in your rainbow paradise -Paradise-[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
   Strawberry lipstick state of mine -State of mind-[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]               [ch]Ab[/ch]
   I get so lost inside your eyes[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
   Would you believe it?[/tab]


[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
So I think I better go,     I never really know[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ab[/ch]                                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
How to please you, you're lookin' at me like I'm see-through[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
  I guess I'm gonna go,     I just never know[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ab[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
How you feel, do you even feel anything?[/tab]


[tab]                                    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
  You said, "don't treat me badly",     but you said it so sadly[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Ab[/ch]                                           [ch]Bb[/ch]
So I did the best I could not thinkin' you would   have left me gladly[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                         [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
  I know you're not sorry,     why should you be?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Ab[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]            -nc-
'Cause who am I to be in love, when your love never is for me, me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Cm[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]
Honey -Ah-ah-ah-[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]Cm[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]
Oh, honey -Ah-ah-ah-[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]Cm[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]
